creator: var@schellong.biz
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #1)

405]  pkg search gcc
pkg: http://pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:11:amd64/quarterly/meta.txz: Not Found
pkg: http://pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:11:amd64/quarterly/packagesite.txz: Not Found
406]  pkg update
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
pkg: http://pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:11:amd64/quarterly/meta.txz: Not Found
repository FreeBSD has no meta file, using default settings
pkg: http://pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:11:amd64/quarterly/packagesite.txz: Not Found
Unable to update repository FreeBSD
Error updating repositories!
407]  

408]  l -d /usr/ports/lang/gcc*
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  512 Jun 22  2018 /usr/ports/lang/gcc
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  512 Jun 22  2018 /usr/ports/lang/gcc-ecj45
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel  512 Jun 22  2018 /usr/ports/lang/gcc47

At time I can't get gcc12 or similar.

409]  uname -a
FreeBSD fbsd.lokal.biz 11.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE #0 r335510: Fri Jun 22 04:32:14 UTC 2018     root@releng2.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
410]  

At time I can't install a newer FreeBSD.
I am waiting for a new HEDT platform since years. (A successor of Skylake-X.)
